title: XehTascing
description: More random cool stuffs for hexcasting.
body:
# XehTascing
Some hexlink stuffs unrelated to spirits, now in a cool stand-alone mod! Waw!
Upgraded Spellbook, Special staff, mixed pigments, nbt patterns, snake staff, ...

/!\ There is duplicate content with 2.3.3 Hexlink and below. Use only Hexlink if you want both mods./!\

## Upgraded Book  ![upgraded_book_empty](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/assets/65395998/a00eaf0c-4561-480b-9fa1-9317acf1019a)
A better version of the spellbook:  

- He cast spell using the caster stack so you can add iotas on your stack as an input and he can can leave iotas on the stack as an output.
- You can cast a spell by right clicking with it
- He is colorable with color spirits.

## Special Staff
![spirits](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/special_wand.gif?raw=true)
A programmable and colorable staff. Write a spell in it, then when you draw a pattern using it, the spell treat it and return your new stack. You can make a staff that cast the pattern and add it to a list at the bottom of the stack , a staff that don't call the pattern but instead draw it in the world using block, or a staff for writing a pattern to a scroll on wall you are looking just by drawing it per example.

## Mixed Pigment
![pigment](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/assets/65395998/f9a5b6f1-7a14-483d-8c1c-4c1adf0c36c1)
New 2-colors custom pigments, you can find predefined ones in various chests and craft them.
